scripts.test: bun test --test-name-pattern '^(?!.*(soak mode completes a tiny supervised run|acceptance mode completes a tiny supervised run and emits a sample)).*$'
scripts.test:coverage: bun test --coverage --test-name-pattern '^(?!.*(soak mode completes a tiny supervised run|acceptance mode completes a tiny supervised run and emits a sample)).*$'
scripts.build: bun run ../../scripts/build-package.ts --entry src/index.ts --entry src/cli.ts --entry src/run/manager.ts --entry src/run/acceptance.ts --entry src/run/soak.ts --entry src/run/supervisor.ts --entry src/bench/memory.ts
